creator: @j.newtrition
transcript: I mean, you can't go wrong eating a double cheeseburger and still hitting your goals. I'm a weight loss dietician and this is my go-to order for In-N-Out. This is going to be the easiest freaking fast food order you'll ever do because In-N-Out doesn't really have a lot of options anyways. All you're going to do is ask for a double-double protein style with a tomato bun and a lettuce bun. The reason for this is because now we get even more veggies, we get more food volume, and at least a little bit of nutrition with what we're eating. Then on top of that, I get a Diet Coke along with it and that is the complete order. And that leaves us with a burger that's 30 grams of protein for 450 calories. On Apple Tea.
caption:
Best In-N-Out Burger order

Macros: 30g P / 12g C / 32g F

#healthyburger #fastfoodsecrets #easylunch
ocr_summary: In N Out Order, 30g Protein & 450 Calories. Double Double protein style visible on screen.

swaps.swap_meal: Double-Double Protein Style (lettuce wrap) with tomato + Diet Coke

parsed.notes: Simple swap: order Double-Double 'protein style' (lettuce wrap instead of bun) to cut carbs/calories. Creator emphasizes adding tomato for more veggie volume. Full macros from caption: 30g P / 12g C / 32g F = 450 cal. This is a well-known In-N-Out secret menu hack. Diet Coke as zero-cal drink pairing.
